scripts.check: node --check ./mcp/server.mjs && node --check ./mcp/lib/plugin-root.mjs && node --check ./mcp/lib/widget-resource.mjs && node --check ./mcp/lib/cowart-static-widget.mjs && node --check ./mcp/lib/canvas-storage.mjs && node --check ./scripts/probe-mcp.mjs && node --check ./scripts/start-mcp.mjs && node --check ./scripts/vite-build-once.mjs
